props.title: Frequently Asked Questions about Furnace Maintenance in {city}

faqs.question: How often should I have my furnace tuned up?
faqs.answer: We recommend an annual furnace tune-up, ideally in the fall before the heating season begins. Regular maintenance helps prevent breakdowns, improves efficiency, and extends the life of your system.

faqs.question: What does a furnace tune-up include?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive tune-up includes inspecting and cleaning the burner assembly, checking the heat exchanger for cracks, testing safety controls, lubricating moving parts, checking the thermostat, and replacing the air filter.

faqs.question: Can regular maintenance lower my heating bills?
faqs.answer: Yes. A well-maintained furnace operates more efficiently, which can reduce your heating bills by up to 15-20%. It also helps prevent costly emergency repairs during the coldest months.
